title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Reliance Footprint in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
